_comment: Single source of truth for the accepted SWTools runtime artifact hashes. Current accepted package: releases/1.1.6/SWTools-1.1.6-Setup.exe, setup sha256 29ffc4749c93c6c64e6da783c5cb65ddde96cdc4133d350d68879f240d43deae. Both scripts/verify_release_package.ps1 and scripts/sw_test_preflight.ps1 load their default expected hashes from this file. Update here when the accepted build changes.
